items.title_en: Luxury stocks spike on proposed U.S.-Iran peace deal; LVMH up 5%
items.title_zh: 奢侈品股因美国与伊朗和平协议提议而飙升；路威酩轩集团上涨5%
items.desc_en: Luxury stocks have been hard hit by the Iran war, as the Middle East had been a fast-growing market for the otherwise largely muted sector.
items.desc_zh: 奢侈品股受到​​伊朗战争的严重打击，因为中东对于原本基本平静的行业来说一直是一个快速增长的市场。

items.title_en: SpaceX's Gwynne Shotwell says IPO is one small step in 'very futuristic' journey
items.title_zh: SpaceX 的格温·肖特韦尔 (Gwynne Shotwell) 表示，首次公开募股是“非常未来主义”旅程中的一小步
items.desc_en: Gwynne Shotwell, long Elon Musk's second-in-command at SpaceX, spoke exclusively with CNBC ahead of her company's highly anticipated IPO.
items.desc_zh: 格温·肖特韦尔 (Gwynne Shotwell) 是埃隆·马斯克 (Elon Musk) 长期以来在 SpaceX 的二把手，在公司备受期待的 IPO 之前接受了 CNBC 独家采访。

items.title_en: Proposed Iran-U.S. deal would reopen Hormuz strait and lift oil sanctions, Iran state media says
items.title_zh: 拟议的伊朗-美国伊朗官方媒体称，协议将重新开放霍尔木兹海峡并解除石油制裁
items.desc_en: U.S. President Donald Trump said Thursday that the Strait of Hormuz would be reopened as soon as a deal is signed.
items.desc_zh: 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普周四表示，一旦协议签署，霍尔木兹海峡将重新开放。

items.title_en: Meta reportedly begins dismantling $2 billion Manus deal on Beijing's orders
items.title_zh: 据报道，Meta 在北京的命令下开始取消价值 20 亿美元的 Manus 交易
items.desc_en: Meta has reportedly begun dismantling its acquisition of Manus, moving to comply with Beijing's unprecedented order to hand back the Chinese-founded AI startup.
items.desc_zh: 据报道，Meta 已开始取消对 Manus 的收购，以遵守北京前所未有的命令，交还这家中国成立的人工智能初创公司。

items.desc_zh: 尽管人们对其道德和环境影响日益感到不安，但 ChatGPT 在 5 月份的月用户数已达 10 亿。

items.title_en: Trump claims deal to end Iran war near as Tehran says 'nothing' finalised

items.desc_en: The US president says a "great settlement" to end the conflict has been reached. Iran says reports of a deal are "speculative".
items.desc_zh: 美国总统表示，结束冲突的“伟大解决方案”已经达成。伊朗表示，有关达成协议的报道是“推测性的”。

items.title_en: A Chinese start-up's unfolding dilemma exposes cracks in Beijing's tech funding machine
items.title_zh: 一家中国初创企业的困境暴露了北京科技融资机制的漏洞
items.desc_en: While the U.S. channels support to tech winners indirectly via incentives, Chinese governments at every level take direct equity stakes.
items.desc_zh: 美国通过激励措施间接向科技赢家提供支持，而中国各级政府则直接持有股权。

items.desc_zh: 卡梅洛·安东尼 (Karmelo Anthony) 的家人表示，谋杀案判决和量刑后“没有人获胜” 哥伦比亚广播公司 (CBS) 新闻 卡梅洛·安东尼 (Karmelo Anthony) 刺伤案如何成为德克萨斯州福布斯的种族爆发点 定罪一天后，卡梅洛·安东尼 (Karmelo Anthony)

items.title_en: Who is Elon Musk and what is his net worth?
items.title_zh: 谁是埃隆·马斯克？他的净资产是多少？
items.desc_en: The boss of X, Tesla and SpaceX is the world's richest person - and might even soon become a trillionaire.
items.desc_zh: X、特斯拉和 SpaceX 的老板是世界首富，甚至可能很快成为万亿富翁。

items.title_en: Deadly Sudan drone strike targets funeral procession
items.title_zh: 苏丹致命无人机袭击送葬队伍
items.desc_en: Rights groups accuse the RSF paramilitary group of killing civilians in el-Obeid, a city on the civil war's front line.
items.desc_zh: 人权组织指责无国界医生组织准军事组织在内战前线城市奥贝德杀害平民。

items.title_en: Artan to referee Uefa Super Cup after losing World Cup spot
items.title_zh: 阿尔坦失去世界杯参赛资格后将担任欧洲超级杯裁判
items.desc_en: Somali referee Omar Artan is appointed to take charge of the Uefa Super Cup match between Paris St-Germain and Aston Villa later this summer after being denied a spot at the World Cup.
items.desc_zh: 索马里裁判奥马尔·阿尔坦在被拒绝参加世界杯后，被任命负责今年夏天晚些时候巴黎圣日耳曼队和阿斯顿维拉队之间的欧洲超级杯比赛。

items.title_zh: LocIn AI
items.desc_en: Localize your app with tone-aware AI, automated workflows
items.desc_zh: 使用音调感知 AI、自动化工作流程本地化您的应用程序

items.title_zh: ShellMate
items.desc_en: Manage SSH servers, credentials, and teams in one place
items.desc_zh: 在一处管理 SSH 服务器、凭据和团队

items.title_zh: Clutch Alarm
items.desc_en: Sleep through the night. Wake up for the goals.
items.desc_zh: 睡整夜。为目标醒来。

items.title_en: Tide
items.title_zh: Tide
items.desc_en: Layered voice notes that paint themselves
items.desc_zh: 分层的语音笔记可以自我描绘

items.title_en: Nigeria evacuates citizens from South Africa as anti-migrant sentiment rises
items.title_zh: 随着反移民情绪高涨，尼日利亚从南非撤离公民
items.desc_en: Nigeria is the latest African state to repatriate citizens following reports of xenophobic attacks.
items.desc_zh: 尼日利亚是最新一个在接到仇外袭击报告后遣返公民的非洲国家。

items.title_en: Pope Leo heads to Canary Islands to highlight perilous journeys of migrants
items.title_zh: 教皇利奥前往加那利群岛强调移民的危险旅程
items.desc_en: During his visit, the Pope will appeal for a humane approach and respectful welcome for migrants seeking a better life.
items.desc_zh: 在访问期间，教皇将呼吁以人道的方式并尊重地欢迎寻求更好生活的移民。

items.title_en: Thai court sentences two men to death over Bangkok shrine bombing
items.title_zh: 泰国曼谷圣地爆炸案两名男子被泰国法院判处死刑
items.desc_en: Twenty people died and 120 others were injured in the explosion at the Erawan shrine 11 years ago.
items.desc_zh: 11年前，四面佛发生爆炸，造成20人死亡、120人受伤。

items.title_en: Knicks fans go wild as New York team makes biggest comeback in NBA Finals history
items.title_zh: 尼克斯队球迷疯狂，纽约队实现 NBA 总决赛历史上最大的逆转
items.desc_en: Wednesday's result means the team are now just one win away from a famous Finals win.
items.desc_zh: 周三的结果意味着球队现在距离著名的总决赛胜利仅差一场胜利。

items.title_en: Social media on trial: Four important cases to watch
items.title_zh: 审判中的社交媒体：四个值得关注的重要案件
items.desc_en: Social media firms face thousands of lawsuits, the BBC looks at four which could be significant.
items.desc_zh: 社交媒体公司面临数千起诉讼，英国广播公司 (BBC) 调查了四起可能影响重大的诉讼。

items.title_zh: Meet Warren 3.0
items.desc_en: Your voice-supported AI financial planning partner
items.desc_zh: 您的语音支持人工智能财务规划合作伙伴

items.title_en: Four days of extreme rain killed 7% of world's rarest orangutans, study says
items.title_zh: 研究称四天的极端降雨导致世界上 7% 的稀有猩猩死亡
items.desc_en: Climate change-induced weather events are pushing orangutan populations to extinction, says a study.
items.desc_zh: 一项研究称，气候变化引发的天气事件正在将猩猩种群推向灭绝。

items.title_en: pleNx — Plex client for Nintendo Switch
items.title_zh: pleNx — Plex client for Nintendo Switch
items.desc_en: The first native Plex client for Nintendo Switch
items.desc_zh: Nintendo Switch 的第一个原生 Plex 客户端

items.desc_en: USD account & credit cards for freelancers & creators
items.desc_zh: 适合自由职业者和创作者的美元账户和信用卡

items.desc_en: Block social media until you've actually slept
items.desc_zh: 屏蔽社交媒体，直到你真正睡着为止

items.title_en: Olivia Rodrigo sings about heartbreak but she's already chosen her wedding song
items.title_zh: 奥利维亚·罗德里戈 (Olivia Rodrigo) 唱着关于心碎的歌，但她已经选择了婚礼歌曲
items.desc_en: The pop star discusses the difficulty of writing happy songs, and her Glastonbury anxiety attack.
items.desc_zh: 这位流行歌星讨论了创作快乐歌曲的困难，以及她的格拉斯顿伯里焦虑症。

items.title_en: French singer Patrick Bruel faces rape charges
items.title_zh: 法国歌手帕特里克·布鲁埃尔面临强奸指控
items.desc_en: Bruel has been placed under judicial investigation, which means an examining magistrate will look more deeply into the case.
items.desc_zh: 布鲁尔已接受司法调查，这意味着预审法官将更深入地调查此案。

items.title_en: Onpilot
items.title_zh: Onpilot
items.desc_en: An AI workforce customized to your business
items.desc_zh: 为您的业务定制的人工智能劳动力

items.title_en: Kalshi to make some users reveal job details to tackle insider trading
items.title_zh: Kalshi 要求部分用户透露工作细节以应对内幕交易
items.desc_en: After issues with insider trading, the prediction betting platform is adding new rules.
items.desc_zh: 在出现内幕交易问题后，预测博彩平台正在添加新规则。

items.title_en: Tech Life
items.title_zh: 科技生活
items.desc_en: Check before check-in. What's behind a new safety campaign about power banks on aircraft?
items.desc_zh: 入住前请检查。关于飞机上移动电源的新安全运动背后的原因是什么？

items.title_en: Version of AI tool 'too powerful for public' released to public
items.title_zh: 人工智能工具版本“对公众来说太强大”向公众发布
items.desc_en: Claude Fable 5 is a version of Anthropic's Claude Mythos, an AI program which caused a stir among technology, finance, and government leaders
items.desc_zh: Claude Fable 5 是 Anthropic 的 Claude Mythos 的一个版本，这是一个在技术、金融和政府领导人中引起轰动的人工智能程序

items.title_en: Farage says Reform has contacted X 'at highest level' over fake AI ads
items.title_zh: Farage 表示 Reform 已就虚假 AI 广告问题与“最高层”X 联系
items.desc_en: The fake ads feature the governor of the Bank of England - the Bank has urged people to report them.
items.desc_zh: 这些虚假广告的主角是英格兰银行行长，该银行已敦促人们举报这些广告。

items.title_en: EU orders Meta to open WhatsApp to rival AI chatbots
items.title_zh: 欧盟命令 Meta 向人工智能聊天机器人开放 WhatsApp
items.desc_en: Meta has accused the EU of "regulatory overreach" and says its decision will allow tech giants like OpenAI free access to WhatsApp.
items.desc_zh: Meta 指责欧盟“监管越权”，并表示其决定将允许 OpenAI 等科技巨头免费使用 WhatsApp。

items.title_en: Could humanoid robots be heading for the battlefield?
items.title_zh: 人形机器人会走向战场吗？
items.desc_en: Armed forces are experimenting with humanoid robots, but battlefield deployment is some way off.
items.desc_zh: 武装部队正在试验人形机器人，但距离战场部署还有一段距离。

items.title_en: OpenAI plans to go public, intensifying investment race with Anthropic
items.title_zh: OpenAI拟上市，与Anthropic的投资竞赛加剧
items.desc_en: The company behind ChatGPT filed its plans one week after Anthropic did the same.
items.desc_zh: ChatGPT 背后的公司在 Anthropic 提交计划一周后也提出了同样的计划。

items.title_en: Apple unveils Siri AI makeover as Tim Cook bids farewell
items.title_zh: 蒂姆·库克 (Tim Cook) 告别之际，苹果推出 Siri AI 改造版
items.desc_en: The technology giant also revealed a series of new child safety features amid widespread scrutiny over "nudification" apps.
items.desc_zh: 在对“裸体”应用程序的广泛审查中，这家科技巨头还推出了一系列新的儿童安全功能。

items.title_en: Jailed crypto founder Sam Bankman-Fried seeks Trump pardon
items.title_zh: 被监禁的加密货币创始人萨姆·班克曼·弗里德寻求特朗普赦免
items.desc_en: The former leader of crypto platform FTX, currently serving a 25-year sentence, on Monday officially applied to be pardoned.
items.desc_zh: 加密货币平台 FTX 的前领导人目前正在服刑 25 年，周一正式申请赦免。

items.title_en: NODUS PH Radar for Product Hunt
items.title_zh: NODUS PH Radar for Product Hunt
items.desc_en: Product Hunt analytics beyond the daily leaderboard
items.desc_zh: 每日排行榜之外的产品搜寻分析

items.title_en: Starmer tells Apple and Google to ban nude images on children's phones
items.title_zh: 斯塔默告诉苹果和谷歌禁止儿童手机上出现裸照
items.desc_en: Firms will be expected to activate built-in features to stop children accessing sexually explicit images.
items.desc_zh: 公司将被期望激活内置功能来阻止儿童访问露骨的色情图片。

items.title_en: Firma.dev
items.title_zh: Firma.dev
items.desc_en: E-signatures API for your app averaging ~3¢ per envelope
items.desc_zh: 您的应用程序的电子签名 API 每个信封平均约为 3 美分

items.title_zh: Pond
items.desc_en: Fundraising, GTM, and bounties for startups
items.desc_zh: 初创公司的筹款、GTM 和奖励

items.title_en: The gamers taking on the industry to stop it switching off games
items.title_zh: 游戏玩家向行业发起挑战，阻止其关闭游戏
items.desc_en: Stop Killing Games is challenging the idea publishers can shut down a game without making sure it's still playable.
items.desc_zh: Stop Killing Games 正在挑战发行商可以在不确保游戏仍然可玩的情况下关闭游戏的想法。

items.title_en: Trump to meet AI leaders to discuss US investment in their companies
items.title_zh: 特朗普将与人工智能领导人会面，讨论美国对其公司的投资
items.desc_en: The US president said on Friday he expects to meet the leaders of top AI companies next week.
items.desc_zh: 美国总统周五表示，他预计下周将与顶级人工智能公司的领导人会面。

items.title_zh: 科技生活
items.desc_en: The tech company announces its new Majorana 2 chip.
items.desc_zh: 这家科技公司宣布推出新的 Majorana 2 芯片。

items.title_en: Nodey
items.title_zh: Nodey
items.desc_en: Your n8n command center, now on your phone
items.desc_zh: 您的 n8n 命令中心现在就在您的手机上
